---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement with clear rationale and success criteria
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What real problem does this solve?

## Proposal

Describe the proposed solution.

## User Value

What practical value does this provide?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Expected Technical Impact

- Affected layers (UI, ViewModel, Repository, Room, Worker)
- Risk/complexity
- Possible migrations

## Checklist

- [ ] I checked related issues/discussions.
- [ ] Scope and objective are clear.
- [ ] No private business strategy/roadmap details were included.
